title: Unsolved Mathematics Tier List
description: Open problems ranked by theoretical depth, cross-domain power & breakthrough potential. S-tier the goated four (Riemann, P vs NP, Navier–Stokes, Yang–Mills + Mass Gap), down to D-tier (Large Cardinals, Ult(L), higher topos, other exotic problems).

title: Mathematics Tier List
description: Branches of math ranked by usefulness, power & real-world impact. S-tier the workhorses (Optimization, Linear Algebra, Probability & Statistics, Stochastic Processes, Game Theory) down to D-tier (Advanced Set Theory, Model Theory, Higher Category Theory, Large Cardinals).

title: Chemistry Tier List
description: Subfields of chemistry ranked by usefulness, leverage & industrial impact. S-tier (Thermodynamics, Kinetics & Reaction Engineering, Organic Applied, Electrochemistry, Process & Chemical Engineering Basics) down to D-tier (Pure Theoretical, Exotic Orbital Models, Over-Specified Synthesis, Paper Chemistry).

title: Neurotransmitter Tier List
description: Ranked by importance, versatility, effect & how good they make you feel. From S (the goated: Dopamine, Serotonin, Acetylcholine, Glutamate, GABA) down to D (the overhyped). Simplified for educational and entertainment purposes — not medical advice.
